packageTemplates.name: Seedling Vigor Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support early crop establishment and vigor
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use as per approved label and crop stage advisory.
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Validate crop-use and dose before production deployment.

packageTemplates.name: Botanical Insect Pressure Package
packageTemplates.objective: General package for chewing and sucking pest pressure
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Dose to be finalized crop-wise and pest-wise.
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Do not publish as a label recommendation without agronomy approval.

packageTemplates.name: Whitefly and Sucking Pest Package
packageTemplates.objective: Management package for whitefly, aphids, jassids and thrips pressure
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Finalize dose crop-wise before production use.

packageTemplates.name: Caterpillar and Borer Package
packageTemplates.objective: Management package for borers and caterpillar pests
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use after crop and pest validation.

packageTemplates.name: Soil-borne Disease Management Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support against damping off, root rot and wilt complex
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Apply through seed treatment, nursery drench or soil application as validated.
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Crop-use pattern must be validated before launch.

packageTemplates.name: Foliar Disease Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop recovery and resilience under foliar disease pressure
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use only after crop-disease suitability review.
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Supportive package only; not a fungicide claim.

packageTemplates.name: Nutrient Recovery Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop recovery under general nutrient deficiency
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Use deficiency-specific package where exact diagnosis is available.

packageTemplates.name: Nitrogen Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop response under nitrogen deficiency
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use where N deficiency is confirmed.

packageTemplates.name: Phosphorus Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop response under phosphorus deficiency
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use where P deficiency is confirmed.

packageTemplates.name: Potassium Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop response under potassium deficiency
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use where K deficiency is confirmed.

packageTemplates.name: Zinc Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop response under zinc deficiency
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use where Zn deficiency is confirmed.

packageTemplates.name: Silicon Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support crop response under silicon deficiency and weak plant structure
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use where silicon deficiency or weak stem expression is observed.

packageTemplates.name: Abiotic Stress Support Package
packageTemplates.objective: Primary support recommendation for abiotic stress conditions
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Finalize crop-wise and stage-wise dose internally.
packageTemplates.complianceNote: Primary abiotic stress positioning to be validated internally.

packageTemplates.name: Root Establishment Package
packageTemplates.objective: Support root development and transplant establishment
packageTemplates.dosageNote: Use in nursery, transplanting or early establishment phases.
